data.title: GAC showcases technology and culture at 138th Canton Fair with three strategic models - AION UT, S7, and HPYTEC.
data.description: In Guangzhou, China, the 138th Canton Fair kicked off with a lavish ceremony on October 15, 2025. The event, themed "Where Craft Meets Technology," saw GAC showcasing three key models - AION UT, S7, and HPYTEC - demonstrating technological prowess. The fair, a prominent trade event, attracted a significant number of attendees and industry professionals looking to engage with cutting-edge products and innovations.

data.title: Bitcoin treasury firms should only launch if they have a clear advantage, says exec. Debate over potential bubble escalates.
data.description: According to a Bitcoin treasury executive, firms holding Bitcoin in reserve have minimal incentive to launch without a distinct advantage. This statement comes amidst increasing discussions about whether there is a bubble forming in the market.

data.title: GrantWatch connects nonprofits to thousands of foundation grants during the 2025 government shutdown, offering critical support.
data.description: GrantWatch is stepping in to bridge the gap for nonprofits during the ongoing federal government shutdown. The program, located in Boynton Beach, Florida, is providing vital support by linking organizations to numerous foundation and private grants. With government aid on hold, this lifeline is crucial for nonprofits facing stalled programs and uncertain staff situations. GrantWatch's services offer access to thousands of grants, offering much-needed assistance during this challenging time.

data.title: Fosun's chairman Wang Qunbin highlights innovation at Sustainability Global Leaders Conference in Shanghai with 500 guests.
data.description: In Shanghai on October 16, 2025, the 2025 Sustainability Global Leaders Conference took place, focusing on the theme "Joining Hands to Address Challenges: Global Action, Innovation, and Sustainable Growth". The event gathered around 500 attendees, discussing key issues related to sustainability.

data.title: New from Gala Games: VEXI Nightshade, a gothic character unveiled in a Mystery Box release. Limited availability and special offers!
data.description: Gala Games has unveiled VEXI Nightshade, a captivating character exuding gothic appeal, through a Mystery Box drop available for a limited time. The release offers exclusive special deals along with the opportunity to explore the odds of obtaining VEXI Nightshade in this unique collection.
